category_title: Students with low academic achievement engaging in reflective knowledge-building discourse
minimal_context: The student is working in a small group to build a three-dimensional mind-map using colored wires for a collaborative inquiry task.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's start our collaborative inquiry task by building a three-dimensional mind-map with these colored wires.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the wires away) I don't want to do this.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you could add to the group's map?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Nothing. I'm not good at this and my ideas are probably wrong anyway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying to work with your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts head on the desk) I don't care about this schoolwork, I'm not doing it.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's start our collaborative inquiry task by building a three-dimensional mind-map with these colored wires.

STUDENT: (Pushes the wires away) I don't want to do this.

TUTOR: What do you think you could add to the group's map?

STUDENT: Nothing. I'm not good at this and my ideas are probably wrong anyway.

TUTOR: Just keep trying to work with your group.

STUDENT: (Puts head on the desk) I don't care about this schoolwork, I'm not doing it.

task.learning_goal: increase the students ’motivation and enhance their communication and collaboration skills

context.materials: wires of various colors, three-dimensional mind-maps, knowledge wall

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: General academic context of students in Band-3 schools in Hong Kong prior to the intervention
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: not adequately engaged with their schoolwork and academic achievement

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: exhibit little interest and negative attitudes toward their learning
